S.FORM: == Alexis Ajin√ßa == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i 1988 amihcan 5 a bulad 6 a demiad, Alexis Ajin√ßa, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u France kanatal a tademaw ciniza. 2008 a mihcan, mapili' nu Siyalothe Sanmaw putiput. ayza sa mimali i Niwauoliang Tihu putiput. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alexis Ajin√ßa is a French professional basketball player for the New Orleans Pelicans of the National Basketball Association (NBA). He is a 7 ft 2 in (2.18 m), 248 lb (112 kg) center.
S.PHON: == ar~…æ…ô*is ajin*a == u siwkaj niza tatama, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i **** amiƒß ¶an * a bur~…æad * a d…ômiad, ar~…æ…ô*is ajin*a, miunduaj, mimar~…æi i amir~…æika nba. u fran ¶…ô kanatar~…æ a tad…ômaw ¶iniza. **** a miƒß ¶an, mapir~…æi î~ ° nu sijar~…æotƒß…ô sanmaw putiput. ajza sa mimar~…æi i niwauor~…æia≈ã tiƒßu putiput. kakuniza kar~…æunasur~…æitan-sur~…æu u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam atu amir~…æika ar~…æ…ô*is ajin*a is a fr…ôn ¶ƒß prof…ôssionar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ pr~…æaj…ôr for tƒß…ô n…ôw orr~…æ…ôans p…ôr~…æi ¶ans of tƒß…ô nationar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ asso ¶iation (nba). ƒß…ô is a * ft * in (*.** m), *** r~…æb (*** kg) ¶…ônt…ôr.
S.FORM: == Alexis Ajin√ßa == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i 1988 amihcan 5 a bulad 6 a demiad, Alexis Ajin√ßa, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u France kanatal a tademaw ciniza. 2008 a mihcan, mapili' nu Siyalothe Sanmaw putiput. ayza sa mimali i Niwauoliang Tihu putiput. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alexis Ajin√ßa is a French professional basketball player for the New Orleans Pelicans of the National Basketball Association (NBA). He is a 7 ft 2 in (2.18 m), 248 lb (112 kg) center.
